name: Elementary
description: Nice and easy words to get you started. Great for beginners!

name: 1-Syllable Words
description: A massive list containing all 1-syllable rhyme sounds in the English language.

name: 2-Syllable Words
description: Hundreds of 2-syllable rhyming words to expand your vocabulary (contains near-rhymes).

name: 3-Syllable Words
description: Hundreds of 3-syllable rhyming words to expand your vocabulary (contains near-rhymes).

name: All Rhymes
description: Contains all the words from the 1, 2, and 3-syllable word lists.

name: Rap Dictionary
description: If you love to rap, you will use these words A LOT!
